name: Over-the-Door Shoe Organizer — 24 Mesh Pockets
why: Hangs over any standard door — 24 breathable mesh pockets hold 12+ pairs. Zero tools, zero wall damage. Perfect for renters who need shoe storage without a closet.

name: Key Holder Wall Mount — 4 Hooks, Black
why: Wall-mounted with 4 hooks for keys, lanyards, and small accessories. Compact design fits any entryway wall. Mounts with adhesive strips or small nails — renter-safe.

name: L-Shape Freestanding Coat Rack — 67" Height
why: Freestanding — no wall mounting or drilling. L-shape design fits corners and small entryways. Holds coats, bags, and hats without taking floor space.
